name: PT Matahari Putra Prima Tbk
summary: PT Matahari Putra Prima Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, operates a chain of retail stores that offers fast moving consumer goods in Indonesia. The company operates Hypermart stores; Foodmart Fresh and Foodmart Primo supermarkets, which offers fresh foods, bakery products, and ready-to-eat products, as well as eat-in or quick take-away meals, and caf√É¬© and boutique bakery; and Foodmart Express (FMX) convenient stores that provides food and snack products. As of December 31, 2018, it operated 219 stores, including 107 Hypermarts, 2 SmartClubs, 24 Foodmarts, 74 Boston Health & Beauty stores, and 12 FMX convenience stores. The company was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Tangerang, Indonesia. PT Matahari Putra Prima Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Multipolar Tbk.
